3077880.name: Trainz 2022 DLC - Pro Train: BNSF Loco Bundle 1
3077880.description:
Expand your BNSF collection with this loco bundle for a special price and enjoy these detailed locomotives! 

Locomotives included:

- BNSF Dash 9-44CW H3
- BNSF Dash 9-44CW H2
- BNSF Dash 9-44CW H1
- BNSF SD40-2 H3
- BNSF SD40-2 H1

Features (all):

- PBR textures
- animated drivers cabin
- animated wipers
- animated fans
- animated rear door
- custom head and ditchlight
- ACS coupling supported
- running numbers

Additional Features (Dash 9-44 CW):

- weathering skins
- animated displays
- dynamic fuel consumption

Loco names in-game:

BNSF Dash 9-44 CW H1
BNSF Dash 9-44 CW H2
BNSF Dash 9-44 CW H3
BNSF SD40-2 H3 (Pro Train)
BNSF SD40-2 H1 (Green)
3077880.supported_languages: 英语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 捷克语, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 俄语, 法语, 德语
